articles.title: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to September 15, 2013
articles.excerpt: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to September 15, 2013; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 November 01, 2014, EB-3 August 15, 2014. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to September 15, 2013; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 November 01, 2014, EB-3 August 15, 2014. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: Spencer Johnson Replaces Ellis at CSK for IPL 2025 Season
articles.what_this_means: Spencer Johnson, Australian pace bowler, replaces injured Ellis at CSK for IPL 2025's final stages (arriving late April). After a year-long back injury absence, Johnson's comeback carries both tactical advantage (left-arm pace) and fitness questions for the reigning champions' playoff push.

articles.title: RCB Sold for $1.78B: What It Means for IPL 2025 & India Cricket
articles.what_this_means: Royal Challengers Bangalore has been sold to a consortium of Aditya Birla Group and Times of India for $1.78 billion—the largest IPL franchise valuation ever. The deal explicitly includes both men's and women's teams, signaling major investment in women's cricket and suggesting expanded media coverage for US-based Indian cricket fans in IPL 2025.

articles.title: Coney & Tiffen NZC Hall of Fame 2026: Cricket Legends Honored
articles.what_this_means: New Zealand cricket icons Coney and Tiffen have been inducted into the prestigious NZC Hall of Fame, with their formal ceremony happening at the New Zealand Cricket Awards. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this honor highlights how cricket's greatest achievements transcend borders, reminding us that excellence in the sport comes from every nation and era.

articles.title: Drone Tech for Police: Game-Changer for Public Safety Jobs [2026]
articles.what_this_means: Brinc launched a 911 drone to replace police helicopters, creating immediate demand for ML, robotics, and backend engineers. Indian tech professionals can pivot into this high-pay public safety sector ($140K–$240K for mid-senior roles) by building drone + ML projects now. This is one of the few AI growth areas not threatened by ChatGPT alternatives.

articles.title: Kleiner Perkins $3.5B AI Fund: What It Means for Your Tech Career [2026]
articles.what_this_means: Kleiner Perkins' $3.5B AI fund signals a massive hiring surge for AI-skilled engineers starting mid-2026. Machine learning salaries are about to rise, and ChatGPT alternatives will compete for dominance. Indian engineers should start learning Claude and Llama now—skills in these tools become job-market essentials.

articles.title: Seema Sajdeh The Traitors Season 2 India 2026
articles.what_this_means: Seema Sajdeh from Fabulous Lives of Bollywood Wives is being considered for The Traitors India Season 2, Netflix's hit reality psychological thriller format. The show, which begins filming later in 2026, is expected to premiere in late 2026 and will stream globally on Netflix—making it accessible to Indian diaspora viewers across the US.
